package rulefixtures

// scenario for map_growth_without_size_hint: Map insertions inside loops without a visible size hint on the initial make call.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule356NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario356Negative(records []Rule356NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
